neopixel_init.message0: Initialize NeoPixel strip Pin %1 LED quantity %2 LED type %3

neopixel_set_brightness.tooltip: Set the brightness of NeoPixel light strip (0-255)

neopixel_fill.message0: Fill all LED colors Red %1 Green %2 Blue %3
neopixel_fill.tooltip: Fill all LEDs with the same color

neopixel_rainbow.tooltip: Display rainbow effect on LED light strip
